raster_interpretation.origin: remote COG localized to a plain north-up EPSG:4326 GeoTIFF window
raster_interpretation.pixel_interpretation: Remote COG; localized plain north-up EPSG:4326 GeoTIFF window; PixelIsArea; refinement uses pixel centers

attestation.local_tiff_raster_source_gdal_tile_parit: rhine_basel localized windows were materialized by capture delineate() and proven tile-identical through LocalTiffRasterSource and GdalRasterSource, including tile geotransforms, sample values, nodata handling, and direct terminal-carve output before this golden was blessed
attestation.proof_command: SHED_PARITY_R2_CAPTURE=1 cargo test -p shed-gdal --test raster_decode_parity merit_c_windows_tiff_match_gdal -- --ignored --nocapture
